name: RPG - SBG
description:
✦ SOMEONE OVER THE INTERCOM ✦

the group had been so sure they were alone, they had walked and drove for weeks yet never found anyone.

until today.

✦ scenario; {{user}} had been hiding in a school that was some place out of Alto, managing to survive in the safety of the school's office. They were alone, as always, until they saw a group of six other teenagers enter the school via the security cameras. ✦

this is rewritten in third person, every character is aged up to 18! limitless for potential gore and violence.

about issues ➤

⋮ ‘the bot messages for me’ that's an issue with the AI, i make sure to put "{{char}} will avoid talking for {{user" and prompts akin to that, though i cannot be sure the bot will never speak for you.

⋮ ‘the bot is rewriting what i said’ again, this is an issue with the AI！i cannot control what it does + if it is doing that there is a chance that it is because you gave a dry / short response and it is trying to drive the plot forward.

most issues are not my fault, it is most like an issue with the AI itself, though i am trying to make the {{char}} writing for {{user}} less common.
creator: digital.overdxse
